SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: You can select a folder containing the following files: (mp4 webm png jpg mp3 wav webp gif apng). If not specified, the default theme files in the "themes" folder of this project will be played. If the files in the currently used folder have changed, you need to refresh the current Forepaper project.
SettingItems.Title: Select folder containing theme files

SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the opacity of the theme when in screen saver mode
Sets the volume of the video file itself when in screen saver mode
Whether to play the audio file (if it exists in the theme folder) simultaneously (This setting can be ignored if there is no audio file in the theme folder)
Sets the volume of the simultaneously played audio file when in screen saver mode (This setting can be ignored if there is no audio file in the theme folder)
Sets the opacity of the clock when in screen saver mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Screen Saver Mode Clock Time Part Font
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font for the time part of the clock when in screen saver mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Screen Saver Mode Clock Time Part Font Size
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font size for the time part of the clock when in screen saver mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Screen Saver Mode Clock Time Part Font Weight
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font weight for the time part of the clock when in screen saver mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Screen Saver Mode Clock Time Part Font Color
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font color for the time part of the clock when in screen saver mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Screen Saver Mode Clock Date Part Font
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font for the date part of the clock when in screen saver mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Screen Saver Mode Clock Date Part Font Size
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font size for the date part of the clock when in screen saver mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Screen Saver Mode Clock Date Part Font Weight
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font weight for the date part of the clock when in screen saver mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Screen Saver Mode Clock Date Part Font Color
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font color for the date part of the clock when in screen saver mode
If this option is not checked, the 24-hour time format will be used
Sets the opacity of the theme when in operating mode
Sets the volume of the video file when in operating mode
Sets the volume of the audio file when in operating mode
Whether to pause the playback of the theme when in operating mode
Specifies the method to switch between all themes in the theme folder
Specifies the method to switch between all audio files in the theme folder
This value specifies how many seconds to switch to the next theme when playing image type themes
This value specifies how many seconds to switch to the next theme when playing video type themes. If set to 0, the switch will occur only after the video playback finishes.
Specifies how the theme should fill the screen

ItemOptions.ItemHoverTipText: Crops parts beyond the window, ensuring a normal aspect ratio
Stretches the theme to full screen, does not guarantee a normal aspect ratio
Leaves blank areas where the theme does not fill the entire screen, ensuring a normal aspect ratio
Uses the original size of the theme, may result in blank areas or overflow

SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: The hint text in the password input box
Sets the width of the input box for the custom login password
Sets the height of the input box for the custom login password (Note: this also affects the height of the login button)
Select a custom icon file for the login button. If left empty, the default icon will be used.
SettingItems.Title: Please select a file

SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Select a custom icon file for the login button in the mouse hover state. If left empty, the default icon will be used.
SettingItems.Title: Please select a file

SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the gap between the clock and the password input box
Sets the opacity of the theme when in lock screen mode
Sets the opacity of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Clock Time Part Font
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font for the time part of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Clock Time Part Font Size
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font size for the time part of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Clock Time Part Font Weight
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font weight for the time part of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Clock Time Part Font Color
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font color for the time part of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Clock Date Part Font
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font for the date part of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Clock Date Part Font Size
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font size for the date part of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Clock Date Part Font Weight
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font weight for the date part of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Clock Date Part Font Color
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the font color for the date part of the clock when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Lock Screen Mode Password Input Box and Button Opacity
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: Sets the opacity of the password input box and button when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Hide All UI by Default in Lock Screen Mode
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: When entering lock screen mode, all UI elements such as the clock and login button or text boxes are hidden by default. You can trigger their display by clicking on a blank area.

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Toggle UI Display State with Mouse Click in Lock Screen Mode
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: When in lock screen mode, clicking on a blank area toggles the UI elements' display state (show/hide).
Sets the volume of the video file when in lock screen mode

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Adjust Volume with Mouse Wheel in Lock Screen Mode
SettingItems.ItemHoverTipText: When in lock screen mode, the mouse wheel is used to adjust the volume
Sets the volume of the audio file when in lock screen mode

Valid only when in lock screen mode and the theme folder contains multiple videos or images. Can specify 1 letter or number. When using, it must be combined with the modifier keys Ctrl+Alt. If it doesn't work, it may be occupied by another program; try another key.

Valid only when in lock screen mode. Can specify 1 letter or number. When using, it must be combined with the modifier keys Ctrl+Alt. If it doesn't work, it may be occupied by another program; try another key.

SettingItems.ItemCaptionText: Note: If you want to create similar works, please search for and download ScreenSaverDevTool from the Workshop. Using this tool, you can quickly create your own screen saver or lock screen themes.
